purpose: HIDE may not assume every Hawking model is a conventional quantized transformer
why_not_refactored_yet: the functional runtime boundary is frozen but the representation is held under FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY, so HIDE gets the schema and the refusal path now and the implementation when a parent admits a functional stream

QUANTIZED_TRANSFORMER.description: weights are stored as an approximation of the source tensors and decoded before use

FUNCTIONAL_MODEL.description: one or more organs are replaced by a fitted function rather than by an approximation of their weights; there is no tensor to decode

representation_id.note: refuse by name rather than decode an unrecognised codec

generator_id.note: null for classes with no generated state; a runtime that does not implement the named generator must refuse, not approximate

required_expanded_runtime_state.note: a 12 MB artifact that expands to 37 MB resident is not a 12 MB model

load_time_generation.note: the procedural grammar has none; the explicit grammar pays it per layer

example.selection_basis: lowest resident bytes and lowest measured latency

quality_research_label.example: RESEARCH_ONLY, one-stage functional student, not capability
quality_research_label.note: a functional model must never present to a user as a validated model; the label rides with the artifact

refusal_rules: unrecognised representation_id: refuse to load, name the id
recognised representation_id with unrecognised generator_id: refuse to load, name the generator
FUNCTIONAL_MODEL without a quality_research_label: refuse to load
artifact_verification failing on body hash or any tensor hash: refuse to load
declared expanded runtime state exceeding the unified-memory policy: refuse to load, report the shortfall

reference_implementation.parity_gate: relative L2 below 5e-2 and cosine above 0.999 against the CPU authority

current_advice_to_hide: add the capability field and the refusal rules now; do not implement a FUNCTIONAL_MODEL loader until a parent admits a functional stream. The GLM-5.2 functional representation is sealed FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY and must not be served.
